eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Cole, MO; at 12:18 PM on SEP 27, 2019 Effective until 12:33 PM SEP 28, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THE FOLLOWING IS A TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM ORIGINATING FROM THE MISSOURI STATE HIGHWAY PATROL IN JEFFERSON CITY AND COORDINATED WITH THE LOCAL BROADCASTERS IN YOUR COMMUNITY. THIS IS ONLY A TEST.
